title: thelypteris glandulosa var. longipilosa
intro: Thelypteris glandulosa var. longipilosa, also known as the Long-pilose Thelypteris fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris glandulosa var. longipilosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
